content:
## Page Section / Title
Merch Global.

## All Verbatim Text
- Merch Global.

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**: 
  - Primary logo: Stylized meerkat illustration composed of colorful geometric polygons (triangles, trapezoids) in shades of blue, purple, red, yellow, and green. The meerkat has a black nose, dark ears, and white facial accents. Below the illustration is the text "aisalon.ai" with a small triangle icon preceding it. To the right of the illustration is the "ai sa lon" logo with "ai" in lowercase, "sa" and "lon" in bold uppercase, and the tagline "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" in smaller uppercase letters below. 
  - Application on tote bag: The meerkat illustration and "ai sa lon" logo are printed on a white tote bag, with "aisalon.ai" in small text below the meerkat. The logo and tagline are positioned in the bottom right corner of the bag.
- **Color palette**: 
  - Meerkat illustration: Multicolor palette including blue (#3B82F6), purple (#8B5CF6), red (#EF4444), yellow (#F59E0B), green (#10B981), and other vibrant hues. 
  - Background: Light gray (#F3F4F6) for the left section, soft gray (#E5E7EB) for the tote bag background.
- **Typography**: 
  - "Merch Global.": Sans-serif font, bold weight, uppercase. 
  - "ai sa lon": Custom or modified sans-serif font with "ai" in lowercase, "sa" and "lon" in bold uppercase. 
  - "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS": Sans-serif font, regular weight, uppercase, smaller size than the main logo text. 
  - "aisalon.ai": Sans-serif font, regular weight, lowercase.
- **Imagery / photography**: 
  - Left: Isolated meerkat illustration on a white background. 
  - Right: Tote bag with the meerkat illustration and logo, placed on a white metal chair with horizontal slats, against a soft gray background. The photography style is clean and minimal, focusing on the product and branding.
- **Iconography**: Small triangle icon preceding "aisalon.ai" in both the left illustration and tote bag application.
- **Layout grid**: 
  - Left section: White background with the meerkat illustration centered, "aisalon.ai" below it, and the "ai sa lon" logo to the right of the illustration. 
  - Right section: Tote bag centered on the page, with the meerkat illustration and logo prominently displayed.
- **Geometric / decorative elements**: The meerkat illustration is constructed from geometric polygons, creating a faceted, low-poly style.

## Page Layout Summary
The page is divided into two main sections: 
- Left: A white background with the meerkat illustration, "aisalon.ai" text, and "ai sa lon" logo arranged in a balanced composition. 
- Right: A tote bag with the same branding elements, placed on a white metal chair against a soft gray background. The layout is clean and symmetrical, with the left section focusing on the illustration and logo, and the right section showing the practical application of the branding on merchandise.

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- The meerkat illustration and "ai sa lon" logo must be used together as a cohesive unit. 
- The "aisalon.ai" text with the triangle icon should be included below the meerkat illustration. 
- The tagline "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" must be positioned below the "ai sa lon" logo. 
- The branding should be applied to merchandise (e.g., tote bags) in a clean, minimal style, with the meerkat illustration and logo prominently displayed.
